final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand promotional poster for RAN QIU, designed for print and social media brand identity use.

Style/medium: minimalist poster, Eastern aesthetic, natural poetry, warm healing mood, generous negative space, shallow depth of field
Composition: centered or asymmetric with ample white space, single focal natural element foregrounded, brand mark placed with restraint
Subject: brand logo "RAN QIU" integrated with natural autumnal elements (dried botanicals, fallen leaves, or soft branch)
Scene/backdrop: soft, airy background with warm mist or diffused light suggesting an autumn day
Lighting/mood: golden hour warmth, soft diffused light, tranquil and poetic atmosphere
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn rust-red), #E8DCCB (cream beige), #D4A574 (golden amber); warm tones throughout
Materials/textures: delicate paper or linen texture, organic natural surfaces
Text (verbatim): RAN QIU
Constraints: brand mark "RAN QIU" must be clearly legible; color palette strictly #8B3A1E / #E8DCCB / #D4A574; Eastern minimalism with generous negative space
Avoid: busy backgrounds, cold or desaturated tones, Western luxury poster clichés, overcrowded composition, hard shadows
